title: 1st Place — MariTHON National Hackathon
description: Engineered an AI-powered Statement of Facts (SOF) extraction tool utilizing Google Cloud Document AI; successfully parsed complex maritime logs and challenging handwritten add-ons with 100% accuracy, leading to an active deployment by the Integrated Maritime Exchange.

title: Finalist — HackTheWinter National Hackathon
description: Developed an AI-driven credit limit optimization engine using Deep Q-Networks that achieved sub-second latency for 5,000+ requests/min while driving an 8% gain in capital utilization efficiency and capping portfolio risk at <7%.
